text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pfft, that was terrible! You're garbage at this.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you don't need to apologize all seriously or
whatever. I was the one who wanted one...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And come to think of it, my room is pretty messy.
There'd be nowhere to put another plushie. So,
actually, I'm glad you didn't get one.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But I'm starving now. Buy me some ramen and
we'll call it even. Deal? Deal! Let's go!
